entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop studied for total dry matter mapping

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: The total dry matter (TDM) of the plant, used as a measure of growth

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted

entities.name: SOIL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Characteristics of the soil that influence crop growth variations

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The growth progress of the pearl millet plants

entities.name: RADIOMETER
entities.description: An instrument designed to measure reflected red and near-infrared light to calculate NDVI

entities.name: GLOBAL POSITIONING SYSTEM
entities.description: A differential GPS used to provide georeferenced coordinates for NDVI measurements

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: A vegetation index (NDVI) used to estimate plant total dry matter

entities.name: SOLAR IRRADIANCE
entities.description: The amount of solar radiation reaching the plant, affecting NDVI calibration

entities.name: FRACTIONAL VEGETATION COVER
entities.description: The proportion of the ground covered by vegetation, derived from aerial photographs

entities.name: AERIAL PHOTOGRAPHS
entities.description: Images taken from the air used to determine fractional vegetation cover
